metadata.synopsis: When a rocket lands on Mars, the crew finds the planet not entirely dead. As the team begins to explore, they are attacked by horrific and demented creatures at every turn. Battling for their lives, can the survivors make it back to their ship?
metadata.title: The Angry Red Planet

metadata.synopsis: John Saxon, Dennis Hopper and the legendary Basil Rathbone star in this atmospheric -- and influential -- sci-fi cult classic as a team of astronauts embark upon a rescue mission to Mars only to encounter a seductive alien, The Queen of Blood!
metadata.title: Queen Of Blood

metadata.synopsis: Under cover of darkness, while an unsuspecting city sleeps, an alien life form begins to sow the seeds of unspeakable terror. Donald Sutherland, Brooke Adams, Leonard Nimoy, Veronica Cartwright & Jeff Goldblum star in this classic suspense thriller.
metadata.title: Invasion Of The Body Snatchers

metadata.synopsis: When a beautiful alien hybrid (Natasha Henstridge) escapes from his lab, a scientist (Ben Kingsley) hires a team of experts to find her before she is able to mate and produce offspring. It’s a desperate battle and the fate of humanity is at stake!
metadata.title: Species

metadata.synopsis: When an astronaut morphs into an alien entity, impregnating women with deadly results, a clone of Eve (Natasha Henstridge) is sent to hunt him down. But they underestimate Eve’s maternal drive…and now only the strongest species will survive!
metadata.title: Species II
